author: y4rr
content: Plan (Option a — reuse resnet50_dilated): Replace ResNet50Dilated with a thin wrapper around resnet::resnet50_dilated([false,true,true]). The wrapper uses IntermediateFeatures::forward_features('layer4') to extract layer4 features (FCN's exact pattern). named_parameters/named_children/parameters_mut filter out fc.{weight,bias} and prefix with 'backbone.' to match torchvision's IntermediateLayerGetter schema. This delivers correct per-block dilation threading (previous_dilation pattern in resnet.rs::make_bottleneck_layer), eliminates the bn2->conv2.bn remap divergence (since the backbone now uses standard Bottleneck with raw 'bn2' keys), and unifies the ResNet path. Test-side remap simplifies — backbone.layer{3,4}.<j>.bn2.<k> now passes through unchanged (no rename). The DilatedBottleneck struct + make_dilated_layer helper become dead code; they will be removed entirely. DilatedConv2d in aspp.rs stays (still used by ASPP branches 1/2/3).
